current_best_practical.note: v13 seed=42000 (v6 exact seed), sync panel.

investigation_conclusion.finding: v6 seed=42000. Seed variance ~10pp at iter20. Training peaks at iter20 (PFSP echo chamber). Practical ceiling ~0.427.
investigation_conclusion.do_not_run: More vN PPO experiments without fundamentally new intervention

pivot1_mcts_selfplay.config: n-sim=50, dir-alpha=0.3, dir-epsilon=0.25, nash-temperatures, 500g each side

v14_post_mortem.root_cause: BC warm-start from heuristic-only data too weak. GNN PPO v14 started at ~0.192 vs v56 PPO warm-start starting at ~0.441. PPO can't recover 25pp in 20 iters.
v14_post_mortem.lesson: For new architectures, BC warm-start MUST use data from a strong learned model, not just heuristic games.
v14_post_mortem.value_mse_root_cause: BC v1 value_mse=0.77 (near-random). v13 game data in BC v2 already showing value_mse=0.58 at epoch4.

v15_plan.status: BC v2 RUNNING - pid=1024046 eta ~2026-04-20 09:09 UTC
v15_plan.bc_data: data/gnn_warmstart_v15_combined: 334K v13_iter20 games + 2.7M heuristic nash = 3M rows
v15_plan.expected_improvement: +4-8pp vs country_attn_side based on AWR sweep results
v15_plan.bc_v2_status: RUNNING epoch 4/30, value_mse=0.58 (improved vs v14 0.77). Monitor will auto-launch PPO v15.
v15_plan.gate: Bench BC v2 best.pt before PPO. Require panel combined >= 0.28 to proceed.

next_tasks: GNN PPO v15 (PENDING - BC v2 running, ETA 09:09 UTC, monitor auto-launches)
Bench GNN PPO v15 at iter20 (same protocol: 500g/side, seeds 50000/50500). Target: >0.427 to beat country_attn_side
If v15 combined > 0.427 + 3pp = 0.457: match record range; update current_best_practical
Fix running_best selector: replace 30-game panel with 200g heuristic-only mini-bench
PIVOT 3: Try adding MCTS data (data/selfplay_mcts_dir/) to training mix for v16 if v15 beats v13

key_lessons.bc_warmstart_quality: BC warm-start quality = bottleneck for new architectures. v14 (heuristic BC) = 0.192. Always use games from best learned model for BC warm-start. v13 selfplay → BC → GNN PPO is the right sequence.
key_lessons.mcts_collection_speed: collect_mcts_games_jsonl with n-sim=1 (direct policy, batched) is ~100x faster than collect_selfplay_rows_jsonl for learned models (batch vs sequential inference).
key_lessons.panel_unreliability: 30-game panel SE≈0.091. Never use as sole running_best selector. Always bench 500g/side.
key_lessons.pfsp_echo_chamber: PFSP peaks at iter20. External fixtures starved even with heuristic-floor=0.15.
key_lessons.seed_matters: PPO ~10pp seed variance at iter20. Always use seed=42000.
key_lessons.teacher_distillation: For v16+: use teacher distillation from v13_iter20 logits. The value head (MSE 0.77) was the key failure mode. teacher_value_target from model inference >> winner_side binary target.
